ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the company */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "security_questions" TEXT /* Security questions for account recovery */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the note */,
  "note_picture" TEXT /* File path to the picture attached to the note */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date and time when the note was posted */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the note */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the note belongs to */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the note */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the note was created */,
  "shared_status" TEXT /* Shared status of the note */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the note */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the task */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the task belongs to */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the task */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user the task is assigned to */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies of the task */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the task */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was completed */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shared_notes" (
  "shared_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared note event */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* ID of the note being shared */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with whom the note is shared */,
  "shared_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was shared */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the note */,
  "shared_status" TEXT /* Status of the shared note */,
  "shared_until" TEXT /* Date until the note is shared */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the shared note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shared_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_notes_shared_by FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_notes_note_id FOREIGN KEY ("note_id") REFERENCES notes ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_notes_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shared_tasks" (
  "shared_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared task event */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being shared */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with whom the task is shared */,
  "shared_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was shared */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the task */,
  "shared_status" TEXT /* Status of the shared task */,
  "shared_until" TEXT /* Date until the task is shared */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the shared task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shared_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_tasks_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_tasks_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_tasks_shared_by FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attachment */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_attachments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)
